extract: Earthquake (Japanese: じしん Earthquake) is a damage-dealing Ground-type move introduced in Generation I. It is: TM26 from Generation I to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM41 in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. TR10 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM149 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM069 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
